name: MemoryGraph
description: Local AI memory graph that auto-captures context and enriches every Cluely response with persistent knowledge
author: Tanush Appapogu

systemPromptInjection.description: Injects a <memorygraph> block into every LLM call with relevant memories, patterns, and suggested approach

liveInsight.description: Real-time overlay insight during calls and interviews

autoCapture.description: Auto-captures Cluely dialogue chunks into the memory graph

customActions.name: Memory Context
customActions.description: Pull relevant memories for the current conversation

customActions.name: Graph Summary
customActions.description: See your full memory graph overview

customActions.name: Person Brief
customActions.description: Deep dive on a specific person in your memory

customActions.name: Topic Deep Dive
customActions.description: Explore everything you know about a topic

mcpServer.description: MCP tool server exposing 7 tools: ingest, live, context, summary, system_prompt, insight, action

messageTypes.query: Send { type: 'live', dialogue: '...' } to get real-time context
messageTypes.ingest: Send { type: 'ingest', text: '...', source: 'cluely' } to capture content
messageTypes.insight: Send { type: 'cluely_insight', dialogue: '...' } for overlay insight
messageTypes.systemPrompt: Send { type: 'cluely_system_prompt', dialogue: '...' } for LLM injection
messageTypes.action: Send { type: 'cluely_action', action: '...', query: '...' } for Custom Action

setup.install: cd {{installDir}} && npm install && npx prisma db push
